action.reasoning: Observation: Starting fresh. Task is wildlife image classification with domain generalization across camera trap locations, evaluated on balanced accuracy. Analysis: Need to build a robust classifier with class imbalance handling. DINOv2 or CLIP ViT-B should work well as feature extractors. Given heavy class imbalance and domain shift, I'll use a pretrained model with strong fine-tuning + class-balanced sampling/loss. Decision: Start with DINOv2-base + linear head, use weighted cross entropy or class-balanced sampling, train few epochs first to validate pipeline.
